feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: is there any way to call table in public cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any way to call the table in public cloud? for my case I need PERNR and Userid fields from PA0105 table. did anyone know CDS/ API or any other ways?

I checked SAP Business Accelerator Hub. I couldn't able to find the fields PERNR and USERID

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: BTP TRAIL ABAP Instance Unavailable
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am unable to login to my BTP ABAP instance and system shows below error in Eclipse.

Same is the case in BTP account as well.

Please let me know if its a global issue or a local issue in my account.

entry.title: Missing Records in custom CDS view for specific filter value
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm facing an issue in one of my custom cds views. When I execute the CDS and apply a filter on the person field, the view returns correct results for most values, However, for some specific person, no data is returned.

There is no syntax or runtime error, it simply returns empty data for those cases.

Any pointers or suggestions on what to check would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: BAPI_COSTCENTER_GETLIST1 how parameters *FROM and *TO work?
entry.content:
The function module BAPI_COSTCENTER_GETLIST1 has several parameters doubled, one with suffix FROM, one with suffix TO, e.g. COSTCENTER_FROM and COSTCENTER_TO. I understand that they are intervals but isn't it possible to select all values easily or one exact value or all values starting with a constant literal?

The doubled parameters suffixed FROM and TO (instead of * below) are:

  • COSTCENTER_*
  • COMPANYCODE_*
  • PERSON_IN_CHARGE_*
  • DATE_*
  • BUSINESS_AREA_*
  • PERSON_IN_CHARGE_USER_*

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: Disable Total height coloumn based on Event key in O4_Tiger
entry.content: Need to disable total height column in O4_tiger tcode only if custom event type is selected else it has to be enabled

entry.title: BADI-enhancement FI_PAYMENT_PROPOSAL_WF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

i am seeking assistance in an ongoing enhancement of the FI_PAYMENT_PROPOSAL_WF.

Currently we are implementing the F110wfr to approve our f110-proposals and we have noticed some missing functionalities that i was about to correct.

I have therefor implemented a badi for the FI_PAYMENT_PROPOSAL_WF which for some reason is not being called. (I have implemented a lot of badis beforehand.)

What did i do:

Create enhancementspot for FI_PAYMENT_PROPOSAL. I have created this enhancement spot via customizing and via se18 to try both variations. (activated on both ends)

Copied the class (as stated in the guide) - but also tried it from scratch - same results.

BADI is activated/Methods active/customizing active

No workflow gets created even with 100% of the original code. The workflow does not execute.

No debugger breakpoint has been called within my badi.

 

Screenshots:

FI_PAYMENT_PROPOSAL_WF - VRD

BADI Z_F110WFR_WF_FINAL

Activation proof

Active methods

F110WFR settings

WF not active - payment run is allowed (correct parameters)

Modify proposal WF011 message

What is odd is when trying to change the proposal i will get an error from the f110wf package but i am also able to just press on payment run and to pay so the wf is not in place. The proposal screen with the individual work packages were also not shown, soley the message shows me that something is being processed in the background.

REGUH_WFR also detects entries.


Do you have any idea why the workflow is not being triggered, even if the badi is containing the original code?

 

Kind regards and thanks for you help
Fabian

entry.title: How to install/create S_DOCUS1 style?
entry.content:
Hi!

We upgrade SP ECC 618 and in new environment the style S_DOCUS1 doesn't exist anymore. I'm loolking it in SE72 but i didn't find it. So when i try change editor in SE61 for example, the error "The style S_DOCUS1 does not exist" appear.

How can i install/create it? Has any sapnote to create it?

entry.title: Confirmation of production order through BAPI
entry.content:
I just wanted some information regarding the Bapi can you please suggest me what else I can do for the below Query:

During the production order confirmation using BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CREATE_TT, goods movement is successfully executed. However, in the event of an error, the record gets stuck in COGI, necessitating manual intervention for clearance. My primary concern is to ensure that errors are detected and surfaced before the Commit Work statement. Is there a way to prevent the BAPI from posting if an error occurs in goods movement, or what alternative solutions could be considered?"

entry.title: PO exit to update FOC flag to all PO item
entry.content:
Hi.

There is a request to update FOC (Free) indicator to all PO items if meet the FOC criteria.

I have tried using BAdI ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST (MEPOITEM-USMON = X), but it is not covering all scenarios:

method PROCESS_HEADER --> not triggered if no PO header change

method PROCESS_ITEM --> not triggered if no PO item change

method CHECK & POST --> it triggered for all steps but the update seems not working. If we display again the PO, the FOC indicator is blank (not updated)

I found exit EXIT_SAPMM06E* but mostly are for custom fields.  Other exits are more to validation.

Pls advise. Thanks

entry.title: How do I copy the view of the display organization/person in the transaction BP for my own report?
entry.content:
Hello everybody, 

for my current project I need to use the detail view of business partners for my own report. The customer basically wants the person/organization display with all of the tabs in a pop up after a certain event and I can't seem to find the solution to this problem. In the following screenshots underneath the red line you can see the view I need exactly. Any help would be appreciated! 

Many thanks in advance! 

Kind Regards,

Desi

entry.title: Issue with BDT Enhancement for custom fields in BUT000 in BP Tcode
entry.content:
The requirement is to add two new custom fields in BP Transaction in a new tab. We have followed BDT approach, and all the customizations are done accordingly as per below blog:-

SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement - SAP Community

The custom tab along with fields are now visible and are editable in Change/Create mode as well.

However, when we are trying to change the value in these two custom fields during change/create process in BP Tcode, the data is not getting saved at both the BP screen level and the table level (BUT000).

Step 1:

Open a BP in BP Tcode and check Additional Data tab.

 

Fields are blank currently.

2- Go to Change mode and enter some values:

 

3- After pressing save, these values are not getting saved in BUT000 table:

My PAI Code:

FUNCTION zmdg_bup01_pai.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*
DATA: false TYPE boole-boole VALUE ' ',

lt_but000 TYPE TABLE OF but000,

table_name_but000 TYPE fsbp_table_name VALUE 'BUT000'.

 

FIELD-SYMBOLS: <but000> LIKE LINE OF lt_but000.

 

CHECK cvi_bdt_adapter=>is_direct_input_active( ) = false.

* step 1: update xo memory from technical screen structure

cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp_data(

EXPORTING

i_table_name = table_name_but000

IMPORTING

e_data_table = lt_but000[]

).

 

IF lt_but000[] IS INITIAL.

IF gs_but000 IS NOT INITIAL.

gs_but000-partner = cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp( ).

APPEND gs_but000 TO lt_but000.

ENDIF.

ELSE.

READ TABLE lt_but000 ASSIGNING <but000> INDEX 1.

<but000>-zownership = gs_but000-zownership.
<but000>-zclass = gs_but000-zclass.

ENDIF.

 

cvi_bdt_adapter=>data_pai(

i_table_name = table_name_but000

i_data_new = lt_but000[]

i_validate = false

).

* step 2: check fields

CHECK cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_activity( ) <> cvi_bdt_adapter=>activity_display.

ENDFUNCTION.

entry.title: Express Error During Insert into EINA – Key
entry.content:
Hello,

Some users have encountered the following express error: "Error during insert EINA with key 5300047395"

Initially, I investigated the most common cause—number range inconsistencies—but I verified that the number ranges in our system are correctly maintained.
I have also checked some Notes: 1955849 and 1906905 but there are already implemented in our system.

What could caused that and how can i resolve it?

entry.title: post array using ODataV4 / V2
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

 

I have this JSON Post in Odata 

{
"brand" : "ShopRite",
"fundingType" : 10,
"offerCode" : "25041101",
"gs1CoPrefix" : "",
"familyCode" : "0",
"offerSeries" : "1",
"manufacturerCodes" : [ "text", "text2" ],
"taxesReclaimable" : false,
"isTender" : false
}

manufacturerCodes is the array expected by the client.

How can we configure and implement a system to handle arrays in SEGW for OData? I know there are complex types or Collection types in V4, but those require a property (the sub-object has a field label like)  

"manufacturerCodes" : [  code: "text",

                                        code "text2" ]

or 

"manufacturerCodes" : [ { code: "text", }

                                       { code: "text2"  }

                                  ],

Any idea? Is there any standard approach to post a field with an array to SAP OData?

If we post, I'm having this error: "error while parsing an XML stream". Already tried using a collection or complex type.

 

Please
Thanks a lot for your time to help

entry.title: RAP event trigger via SAP GUI tcode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on to consume RAP event from sales order creation. As per requirement, standard event should trigger from sales order creation via EML, Sales order app and SAP GUI related tcode(VA01) as well.

As far as I know RAP event doesn't trigger from SAP GUI tcode. Can anyone help here if there is any way to trigger standard rap event from SAP GUI tcode VA01 ?

Thanks.

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: "IS ASSIGNED" doesn't work after dynamic ASSIGN (in a loop)
entry.content:
I have the below piece of code, I expect that the field symbol is not assigned for the component ATRIBUT (the component doesn't exist), but it says it's assigned, with the value of the previous component ID:

REPORT zdemo.
CLASS ltc_is_assigned_wrong_usage DEFINITION FINAL
  FOR TESTING RISK LEVEL HARMLESS DURATION SHORT.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    METHODS test FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ltc_is_assigned_wrong_usage IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD test.
    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_object,
        id        TYPE c LENGTH 10,
        attribute TYPE c LENGTH 10,
      END OF ty_object.
    DATA(object) = VALUE ty_object( id        = 'Value-ID'
                                    attribute = 'Value-Attr' ).
    DATA(component_names) = VALUE string_table( ( `WRONG` ) ( `ID` ) ( `ATRIBUT` ) ( `ATTRIBUTE` ) ).
    DATA(result) = VALUE string( ).
    LOOP AT component_names INTO DATA(component_name).
      ASSIGN COMPONENT component_name OF STRUCTURE object TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<component>).
      IF <component> IS ASSIGNED. "<===== doesn't work well ???
        result = result && |{ component_name } value: { <component> }\n|.
      ELSE.
        result = result && |{ component_name } not assigned\n|.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( 
          act = result
          exp = |WRONG not assigned\n|
             && |ID value: Value-ID\n|
             && |ATRIBUT value: Value-ID\n| "<==== I expect ATRIBUT not assigned
             && |ATTRIBUTE value: Value-Attr\n| ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Why does "IS ASSIGNED" return true for the non-existing component name ATRIBUT?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: How to filter column values by description if description concatenated to ID
entry.content:
Hello, community

I created RAP application where I have column product which described in projection view as 

      @EndUserText.label: 'Sales org.'
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'SalesOrgDescription' ]
      _SalesOrg.SalesOrgExtId,

And filtering by ext. ID works perfectly, but if I want to filter by description it is not working because column is ID 🙂
Does somebody have idea how to make a work around, should I change text element to SalesOrgExtId? Maybe you have other ideas I'll be appreciated any

entry.title: CDS view entity : how to use domain value in WHERE clause
entry.content:
Hello,

A value of an ABAP domain can be used in the WHERE of the ancient CDS view.

For example in the CDS view I_PurchaseOrderItemPurgIssue, the value 'F' of domain BSTYP is used : view I_PurchaseOrderItemPurgIssue is not a view entity

But it is no more allowed if the CDS view is defined as view entity : View ZTEST_EKKO is defined as view entity

 

 

How can we test a domain value if the view is of type view entity ?

My SAP version is : ABAP 7.56 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

 

 

Chaouki

entry.title: Class FI_TAX_SERVICES causes error RW033 after upgrade
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In my code before calling FM BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST I call method calculate in class FI_TAX_SERVICES .

It works fine in SP27.

We upgraded to SP29. When running the code with the same file  

In SP27 a document is created but in SP29 error RW033 (Accounting Interface: Balance in Transaction Currency                   170.00- )  is displayed.

I see that methods CALCULATE1 and CALCULATE2 were added to the class, and the code is changed.

In the debug I can see that in SP27 AMT_DOCCUR has the original values (1000, -1000) and therefore the balance is 0.  But in SP29 AMT_DOCCUR in row 2 was changed to 1170 and therefore the balance is 170 (-1000, 1170).

Why does the method change 1000 to 1170?

In SP27

In method calculate  of class  FI_TAX_SERVICES:

In SP29

In method calculate1 (which is called from method CALCULATE) of class FI_TAX_SERVICES:

In SP29: When calling the method I tried to add the parameter DIFFERENCE_IS_TAX  = 'X' , but it did not help.

Do I need to add another parameter?

Is there something else that I should do?

Thank you in advanced

Hagit

entry.title: SAP CAPM Development - Calling New Page from Action button
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating a CAP Project using List Report with Object Page. I have 3 entities, the parent entity, child entity and another entity associate to the child. On the object page, is it possible that via action button, we will call another page or popup to maintain entity 3 (associated entity of child entity)? In the page map, I could not find the option to create a new page either.

entry.title: API Integration consume API passing attachment as http link for the 3rd party user to download
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I am working on api integration for Purchase Requisition between SAP and PROCOL. We have to consume the API shared by the client to transfer the data between SAP and PROCOL. We are doing this integration through PIPO. PIPO Consultant has created interface which we have used it in our abap program.

There is only one point which I could not able to achieve. The PR would be having attachments which I have to send it to PROCOL as http link as shown below in a variable of the nested structure shared by PROCOL.

Is it possible that the image attachment which was associated with the PR would be shared as http link by passing into the structure?
